findings.title: Overly permissive CORS with credential support
findings.description: CORS middleware configured with origin: true and credentials: true allowing any origin to make authenticated requests

findings.title: Server version information disclosure via response headers
findings.description: Middleware explicitly sets X-Powered-By and Server headers revealing exact Express and Node.js versions

findings.title: XML External Entity processing enabled in product import
findings.description: libxmljs2 parseXml called with noent: true and nonet: false enabling XXE attacks

findings.title: Verbose error responses expose stack traces to clients
findings.description: Global error handler returns error name, message, full stack trace, request path, and method in JSON response

findings.title: Unrestricted settings modification without authentication
findings.description: PUT /api/settings allows any unauthenticated user to modify security-critical application settings

findings.title: Diagnostics endpoint exposes credentials and environment variables
findings.description: Admin diagnostics returns database credentials, process.env, and system information
